# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES = (Deno.env.get("MODULE_PATHS") ?? Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") ?? "")
  .split(",")
  .map((s) => s.trim())
  .filter(Boolean);

function parseModulePaths(url: URL): string[] {
  const fromQuery = url.searchParams.getAll("module").flatMap((v) =>
    v.split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean)
  );
  const fromEnv = DEFAULT_MODULES;
  const combined = [...fromEnv, ...fromQuery];
  return [...new Set(combined)];
}

function isAllowedModulePath(path: string): boolean {
  if (!path) return false;
  if (path.startsWith("./") || path.startsWith("../") || path.startsWith("/")) return true;
  try {
    const u = new URL(path);
    return u.protocol === "https:" || u.protocol === "http:";
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

async function loadModule(path: string): Promise<unknown> {
  if (!isAllowedModulePath(path)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid module path: ${path}`);
  }
  return await import(path);
}

async function invokePlugin(mod: unknown, req: Request, context: { url: URL; modulePath: string }) {
  if (typeof mod === "function") {
    return await (mod as (req: Request, context: typeof context) => unknown)(req, context);
  }

  if (mod && typeof mod === "object") {
    const m = mod as Record<string, unknown>;

    if (typeof m.default === "function") {
      return await (m.default as (req: Request, context: typeof context) => unknown)(req, context);
    }

    if (typeof m.handle === "function") {
      return await (m.handle as (req: Request, context: typeof context) => unknown)(req, context);
    }
  }

  return { modulePath: context.modulePath, loaded: true, exports: mod };
}

function jsonResponse(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    ...init,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...(init.headers ?? {}),
    },
  });
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const modulePaths = parseModulePaths(url);

    if (modulePaths.length === 0) {
      return jsonResponse({
        ok: true,
        message: "No modules configured",
        availableSources: {
          env: ["MODULE_PATHS", "PLUGIN_MODULES"],
          query: ["module"],
        },
      });
    }

    const results: Array<{
      modulePath: string;
      ok: boolean;
      result?: unknown;
      error?: string;
    }> = [];

    for (const modulePath of modulePaths) {
      try {
        const mod = await loadModule(modulePath);
        const result = await invokePlugin(mod, req, { url, modulePath });
        results.push({ modulePath, ok: true, result });
      } catch (error) {
        results.push({
          modulePath,
          ok: false,
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        });
      }
    }

    return jsonResponse({
      ok: true,
      modules: results,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return jsonResponse(
      {
        ok: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
});
